min-max.label: MIN and MAX Functions
min-max.summary: Find minimum and maximum values in data.

minmax-intro.title: What are MIN and MAX?
minmax-intro.bodyMarkdown: The `MIN` and `MAX` functions in SQL are used to find the smallest and largest values in a column. These are helpful when you want to quickly identify extremes, such as the lowest price or the highest score in a dataset.

minmax-syntax.title: Basic Syntax

minmax-example.title: Example Use Case

minmax-single-choice-1.title: What does the MIN function do in SQL?

options.a: Finds the smallest value in a column
options.b: Finds the largest value in a column
options.d: Sums all values in a column

minmax-single-choice-2.title: Which query finds the highest salary in the employees table?

minmax-multi-choice-1.title: Which of the following are valid uses of MIN and MAX?

options.a: Finding the oldest date in a column
options.b: Finding the highest score in a test

minmax-code-input-1.title: Find the minimum quantity in inventory
minmax-code-input-1.prompt: Write a SQL query to find the smallest value in the `quantity` column of the `inventory` table.

minmax-code-input-2.title: Get the maximum price from products
minmax-code-input-2.prompt: Write a SQL query to find the highest price in the `price` column of the `products` table.
